svg.text: Companion to the SDLC vision diagram. Shows what is implemented in v0.2 vs. committed by phase. See README capability matrix for the canonical version.
Generated from repo state at v0.2: 54 passing tests, 3 ADRs, ontology v1.0.0

g.text: Border style is the primary status indicator (solid vs dashed); colour reinforces but does not carry meaning alone.
OPA in dev OK, rules Phase 2
SBOM OK, Cosign Phase 1, SLSA later
feed back to Plan / Code / Test
TENANT BOUNDARY (per ADR-0003): X-Tenant-ID enforced at API and adapter
Implemented: ontology + Neo4j adapter (typed) + tenant-scoped writes
Foundational AI-Application Layers (the graph data model, all ontology v1.0.0 implemented)
10 AI node types, agent protocols implemented
Implemented: PROMPT_INJECTABLE_INTO, TOOL_INVOKABLE_BY, MEMORY_POISONABLE_BY, DATA_POISONABLE_BY, HALLUCINATION_IMPACTS, CALLS_TOOL, INVOKES_MODEL, USES_PROMPT, RETRIEVES_FROM, PROTECTED_BY
OWASP LLM Top 10 (2025), Agentic Top 10 (2026), MITRE ATLAS
Mapped at the ontology layer, queryable
NIST CSF, ISO 27001, PCI DSS v4 (OSCAL component definitions)
Phase 3 (ADR-0002 reserved for Probabilistic Mitigation model)
G-SIB Profile: BCBS 239, DORA, SR 11-7, EBA ICT, FFIEC
Self-Protection and Governance (the platform's own posture)
CONTINUOUS FEEDBACK LOOP: LEARN to IMPROVE to SHIFT-LEFT to REPEAT
Phase 3+ (the loop closes only after Phase 2 detection + Phase 3 metrics land)
Read alongside: README capability matrix, ADR-0001 (graph-first), ADR-0003 (tenant scoping), ADR-0004 (SaaS out of scope), docs/architecture/threat-model.md
The vision diagram (Agentic-AI-SDLC.png) shows what the platform will be at v1.0. This diagram shows what is shipping now and what is committed by phase.
